heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 4819 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1986section 1631 of Pub. L. 99–198section 4801 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for the Secretary to carry out this chapter, subject to reimbursement from the Board under .section 4809(c)(3)(B)(iv) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Sums appropriated to carry out this chapter shall not be available for payment of an expense or expenditure incurred by the Board in administering an order.
